---
title: "National trends in laryngectomy and the influence of hospital volume on short-term outcomes in Brazil: A 16-year cross-sectional analysis"
date: 2025-11-01
author:
  - name: Martins, Rafael Filipe Dal Ben
  - name: Quirino, Bruna Andressa
  - name: Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Teivelis, Marcelo Passos
  - name: Wolosker, Nelson
  - name: Leite, Ana Kober Nogueira
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Otorhinolaryngology"
  volume: 91
  issue: 6
  doi: "10.1016/j.bjorl.2025.101659"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">National trends in laryngectomy and the influence of hospital volume on short-term outcomes in Brazil: A 16-year cross-sectional analysis</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
